Title: GAJ-FTUE-001 - First-time user enters setup mode
Preconditions: User is new and has no canonical structured resume or completed onboarding resume.
Steps:
1. Open the resume experience as a first-time user.
2. Allow resume engine mode selection to run.
3. Observe the selected mode.
Expected Result: User enters first-time setup mode instead of normal job-aware mode.
Notes: Core mode-selection rule for new users.

Title: GAJ-FTUE-002 - Returning user bypasses setup mode
Preconditions: User has a canonical structured resume/profile and completed onboarding state.
Steps:
1. Open the resume experience as a returning user.
2. Allow resume engine mode selection to run.
3. Observe the selected mode.
Expected Result: User bypasses setup mode and enters the normal job-aware path when applicable.
Notes: Prevents returning users from being trapped in onboarding.

Title: GAJ-FTUE-003 - Setup mode uses shared resume engine
Steps:
1. Enter setup mode.
2. Inspect behavior/components used by setup mode.
3. Compare with normal resume engine behavior where practical.
Expected Result: Setup mode is a mode/state of the shared resume engine, not a separate divergent resume system.
Notes: Mostly architectural/manual until implementation exposes testable hooks.

Title: GAJ-FTUE-004 - Initial profile build does not charge credits
Preconditions: First-time user is eligible for initial resume/profile setup.
Steps:
1. Start first-time resume/profile setup.
2. Complete initial setup actions.
3. Review credit balance and credit ledger.
Expected Result: Initial profile setup is free and does not consume credits.

Title: GAJ-FTUE-005 - Completing setup persists canonical structured resume
Preconditions: First-time user has completed setup inputs or imported resume data.
Steps:
1. Complete guided resume setup.
2. Save/finish the setup flow.
3. Reload account/profile or query stored profile state.
Expected Result: A canonical structured resume/profile snapshot is persisted and available for ATS/matching.

Title: GAJ-FTUE-006 - User routes to Account/Profile after setup
Steps:
1. Finish first-time setup.
2. Observe the next route or CTA.
3. Open Account/Profile if routed there.
Expected Result: User is routed or prompted toward Account/Profile for optional cleanup after setup.
Notes: May depend on final UX routing decision.

Title: GAJ-FTUE-007 - User can continue into Jobs/Match after setup
Preconditions: User has completed setup and has a canonical structured resume/profile.
Steps:
1. Complete first-time setup.
2. Choose to continue into Jobs/Match or Apply Pack flow.
3. Observe whether the profile is available to the downstream flow.
Expected Result: User can continue into Jobs/Match with the canonical profile available.

Title: GAJ-FTUE-008 - Job-aware mode uses canonical profile after onboarding
Preconditions: User completed onboarding and has a canonical structured profile. Job/role context exists.
Steps:
1. Open a job-aware resume or matching flow.
2. Load or apply role/job context.
3. Observe the source profile used by the flow.
Expected Result: Job-aware mode uses the canonical structured profile created during setup.
Notes: Connects FTUE output to later matching/ATS behavior.

Title: GAJ-FTUE-009 - Tutorial messaging explains base resume vs role tailoring
Preconditions: First-time user is in setup/tutorial flow.
Steps:
1. Open setup/tutorial messaging.
2. Read the explanation for base resume/profile setup.
3. Review any mention of tailoring per role later.
Expected Result: Messaging clearly explains that the user builds a strong base resume once and tailors per role later.

Title: GAJ-FTUE-010 - Incomplete onboarding resumes correctly
Preconditions: User starts onboarding but does not complete setup.
Steps:
1. Begin first-time setup.
2. Exit or refresh before completion.
3. Return to the resume experience.
Expected Result: User can resume setup without being incorrectly marked complete or losing entered/imported state.
